meta.siteDescription: The digital maturity ranking of French car dealer groups. 16 groups audited, 87 criteria, 4 dimensions.

hero.title: Digital Auto Rankings France 2026
hero.subtitle: The digital maturity ranking of French car dealer groups
hero.description: 16 groups audited. 87 criteria. 4 dimensions. Full transparency.

ranking.title: Full ranking
ranking.description: All 16 French car dealer groups, ranked by digital maturity.

group.downloadDescription: Receive all 16 audit deliverables for this group by email.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.description: How we measure digital maturity. 87 criteria, 4 dimensions, full transparency.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Each group is evaluated across 4 dimensions, each scored out of 100 points, for a maximum total of 400 points.

seoTechnical.title: D1 — Technical SEO
seoTechnical.description: Can Google crawl and index the site properly? Crawlability, indexability, security, URL structure, mobile, Core Web Vitals.

seoContent.title: D2 — SEO Content
seoContent.description: Is the content deep, authoritative, and well-structured? E-E-A-T signals, depth, readability, blog, internal linking.

email.title: D3 — Email & Deliverability
email.description: Can the domain send emails that reach the inbox? SPF, DKIM, DMARC, blacklists, TLS.

aiCitation.title: D4 — AI Citation
aiCitation.description: Can ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI cite this site? Schema.org, FAQ, entity clarity, AI bot access.

A.label: Tier A
A.description: Digital leaders. Strong foundations, proactive AI readiness.

B.label: Tier B
B.description: Developing. Basics covered but significant gaps.

C.label: Tier C
C.description: Lagging. Multiple issues. Digital presence is a liability.

D.label: Tier D
D.description: Critical. Fundamental failures. Immediate remediation required.

tools.title: Tools and methods
tools.description: All scores are derived from specialized automated agents. Pipeline: Firecrawl scraping, DNS analysis, SEO agents, email agents, AI agents.

transparency.title: Transparency
items: Scores based exclusively on publicly accessible data
Email audit based on DNS infrastructure, not deliverability metrics
Performance scores from a single geographic location (Paris)
Content assessment is point-in-time (audit date stated)
AI citation readiness is an emerging field — criteria will evolve

items.question: How are scores calculated?
items.answer: Each dimension is scored out of 100 points from specific automated checks. The total score is the sum of all 4 dimensions (max 400). Tiers are assigned based on fixed thresholds.

items.question: Is the data public?
items.answer: Yes. All scores are derived from publicly accessible data: DNS, HTML, robots.txt, sitemaps, HTTP headers. No private access (Google Search Console, analytics) is used.

items.question: How often is the ranking updated?
items.answer: The ranking is updated quarterly. Each update includes a full re-scan of all groups.

items.question: How to challenge a score?
items.answer: Each audited group can request the full audit report and challenge findings. If a fix has been deployed since the audit, we re-scan and adjust the score.

items.question: Why is AI Citation a dimension?
items.answer: AI engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) increasingly answer automotive queries. Groups with structured data get cited. Others are invisible.

insights.title: Industry insights
insights.description: Trends, blind spots, and best practices discovered across 16 groups.

blindSpot.title: The industry blind spot: AI Citation
blindSpot.description: At 28/100 average, AI citation readiness is the biggest structural weakness of the French automotive sector.

items.title: Email is the strongest dimension
items.description: Average 62/100. Most groups use Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 with basic SPF/DKIM.

items.title: DMARC p=none is epidemic
items.description: 9 of 16 groups have DMARC at p=none (monitoring only). Anyone can spoof their email domains.

items.title: Zero structured data is the norm
items.description: 11 of 16 groups have zero or near-zero JSON-LD Schema.org markup.

items.title: Blogs exist but are content-light
items.description: Most have a blog or news section but content is shallow (100-400 words), with no SEO strategy.

items.title: No LocalBusiness schema deployed
items.description: 1,500+ combined dealerships across 16 groups, not a single one implements LocalBusiness or AutoDealer at scale.

items.title: Security headers widely neglected
items.description: 8 of 16 groups have zero HTTP security headers. Multiple groups still run Apache 2.4.29 (2017).

about.title: About
about.description: Who we are and why we built this ranking.

who.title: Who we are
who.description: The Digital Auto Rankings France is produced by ElPi Corp / Perello Consulting, a consulting firm specializing in AI-driven digital transformation.

why.title: Why this ranking
why.description: The French automotive industry invests massively in physical dealerships but systematically neglects its digital infrastructure. This ranking makes that reality measurable.
